// src/pages/InfoDriver.jsx import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const InfoDriver = () => { const [trucks, setTrucks] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/trucks') .then(res => res.json()) .then(data => setTrucks(data)) .catch(err => console.error('Failed to fetch trucks:', err)); }, []); return (
{/* Sidebar */}

Admin

Master Data
Tracking
Info Driver
Settings
Logout
{/* Main Content */}

Info Driver

{trucks.map(truck => (

Truck ID: {truck.truckId}

Driver: {truck.driver}

Jenis Truk: {truck.truckType}

Status: {truck.status}

Tanggal: {truck.date}

Lihat lebih lengkap
))}
); }; export default InfoDriver;
